title: polypodium angustum
intro: Polypodium angustum, also known as Southern Polypody, is a type of fern that belongs to the Polypodiaceae family. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Polypodium angustum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and act as an antiseptic, making it a valuable herb in traditional medicine. Polypodium angustum can be prepared in various forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
